default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify GrowthX's AI usage and data handling practices for Webflow's legal team.](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses only publicly available data and APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Perplexity) for their AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [No ingestion or training on client's proprietary data; focus on external sources](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Custom workflows developed for each client, guided by human editors familiar with the client](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Potential for future data sharing would be handled separately, with clear guidelines on non-proprietary info](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI Tools and Data Sources

  - [Uses chain of LLMs with proprietary IP in prompts](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Leverages APIs: OpenAI, Perplexity, SERP API](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Scrapes public websites, sitemaps for relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Generates queries based on learned info (e.g., "AI fraud prevention for banks")](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Develops personas, jobs-to-be-done from public data](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### Workflow Example: DNAI Prospect Research

  - [Generates company overview: elevator pitch, executive summary, products, personas](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Scrapes company website and sitemap (up to 200 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Performs contextual searches based on initial findings](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Develops detailed personas and jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### Custom Workflows for Clients

  - [Adapted for each client (e.g., Webflow-specific context)](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Managed by human editors and directors overseeing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Example: Deep researcher workflow - breaks down topics, generates questions, finds answers](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Stores only publicly available information for downstream use](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Handling Proprietary Information

  - [Current process avoids ingesting any proprietary client data](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [For specific needs (e.g., popular prompts data), clients provide non-proprietary summaries](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Similar to internal controls for employees (e.g., not pasting financials into ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Any future proprietary data handling would be a separate scope/discussion](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### GrowthX's Relationship with Webflow

  - [GrowthX is a Webflow customer and has migrated several clients to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Manages CMS for clients, advocating for Webflow's platform](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Excited about potential engagement and synergistic relationship](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessie to review final pass of agreement with new understanding of AI usage](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Finalize agreement to begin engagement](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Set up workflow customization for Webflow-specific context and needs](https://fathom.video/share/5Yi1NUcv3aGYb6HFS32btwyfyUy2yyzx?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

action_items.description: Review final pass of agreement w/ GrowthX, incorporating new AI/data usage understanding
